title: Business Development Executive
description:
Join TheMeetUpSG - Where Relationships Become Opportunities and Ideas Become Experiences

At TheMeetUpSG, we don’t just run events - we create moments that strengthen teams, elevate brands, and bring people together. We’re expanding fast, and we’re looking for a driven, energetic, and people-centric Business Development Executive to help shape the next chapter of our growth story.

This role blends business development, relationship-building, strategic thinking, and event insights. If you love connecting with people, spotting opportunities, and seeing your ideas turn into real-world experiences, this is your ideal playground.

What You’ll Own & Achieve

  • Identify & pursue new business opportunities through networking, outbound outreach, and digital platforms (LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok)
  • Connect with top decision-makers — HR Leaders, Admin teams, Marketing heads, Directors, and C-suites
  • Lead discovery calls and craft event concepts tailored to each client’s objectives
  • Create compelling proposals, decks & quotations that win deals and build long-term partnerships
  • Manage and grow client relationships with consistent engagement and high-quality service
  • Collaborate with internal teams for smooth project handovers and successful event execution
  • Represent TheMeetUpSG at industry events, networking sessions, and client engagements
  • Support onsite event coordination when required to ensure client satisfaction
  • Track leads & pipeline using CRM tools, ensuring accurate forecasting and follow-ups
  • Explore partnership and sponsorship opportunities to expand event offerings

What You Bring to the Table

  • Diploma/Degree in Business, Marketing, Sales, Events Management, or related field
  • Prior experience in B2B sales or business development (events/hospitality/marketing is a plus)
  • Excellent communication, negotiation & presentation skills
  • A proactive, resilient, and target-driven personality
  • Ability to think strategically, plan ahead, and handle conversations with senior leaders
  • Comfort in hybrid work arrangements and onsite meetings/events
  • A strong existing corporate network is a major advantage
  • Familiarity with CRM systems and digital outreach strategies
  • Salary: Base + Commission

Why This Role Is Exciting
At TMU, you won’t be “just another salesperson.”

You’ll be a key player who drives revenue, builds brand presence, and brings ideas to life. You’ll be working with varied clients, pitching creative event solutions, and growing alongside a team that values innovation, collaboration, and bold thinking. If you’re hungry for growth and want a role where your impact is visible — this is it.

postedCompany.description:
SINGAPORE
MICE EVENTS MANAGEMENT COMPANY
We are your All-in-One Events Planner. We seamlessly transform all our client’s dream events into unparalleled success.

Since our establishment in 2017, we specialise in customised corporate events such as Dinner & Dance, Conferences, Exhibitions, Networking Events and Team Building sessions. We have served many renowned local and international clients.
